summary: Add project-updates create/list commands so agents can post status updates (health + markdown body) to Linear projects via the projectUpdateCreate mutation; require at least one of --body*/--health; include projectId inside input before the dry-run guard so preview matches the live mutation payload.
reason: Linear's ProjectUpdate feature (status posts carrying a health enum and markdown body) had no CLI surface. Agents running weekly project reviews need to write project updates without dropping into raw GraphQL. Without the body/health guard an agent can fire the mutation with an empty payload. Without projectId inside input in the dry-run preview, agents inspecting input to confirm the target project find it absent, diverging from the live mutation shape.
